title: phenax urticifolius var. minor
intro: Phenax urticifolius var. minor, commonly known as the lesser nettle or dwarf nettle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of allergies, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Phenax urticifolius var. minor include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and providing relief from itching and redness. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
